title: eriogonum ursinum var. covillei
intro: Eriogonum ursinum var. covillei, also known as Bear Flat Buckwheat, is a rare and lesser-known species of the buckwheat family, Eriogonum. This plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Bear Flat Buckwheat include reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and supporting wound healing, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy. Bear Flat Buckwheat can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, and is often used in herbal remedies, although proper identification and preparation are crucial due to its potential toxicity.
